hero.title: Your personal AI sports coach,
hero.sub: Connect Strava once. After each activity, Coach GOAT analyzes your data and sends you personalized coaching — performance, recovery, nutrition, technique.
hero.fine: Free · No credit card · Works with all your Strava activities

instant.title: Instant Analysis
instant.desc: The moment your activity syncs to Strava, Coach GOAT starts analyzing. No manual uploads, no waiting.

data.title: Real Data, Real Insights
data.desc: Not generic advice. Coach GOAT reads your actual bpm, km/h, elevation — and tells you what it means.

cards.title: Coaching Cards
cards.desc: Performance, recovery, nutrition, technique, next training plan — delivered as clear, actionable cards.

private.title: Private by Default
private.desc: Your data stays yours. We only read activity data, never post anything to your Strava.

cta.title: Ready to train smarter?
cta.sub: Join athletes who get AI coaching after every activity.

activity.analyzing: Coach GOAT is analyzing your activity...
activity.analyzeFailed: Analysis failed. Make sure the API server is running.
activity.noAnalysis: No analysis yet. Click the button to get your personalized coaching.
activity.limitReached: Daily limit reached ({limit}/day). Resets at midnight.

inactivity.warning: Your session will automatically close in {minutes} minutes due to inactivity.

dashboard.title: Your Activities
dashboard.hint: Every activity you finish on Strava is analyzed automatically.

empty.title: Waiting for your first activity
empty.desc: Complete any activity on Strava and Coach GOAT will analyze it automatically.
empty.goatQuote: Every GOAT started somewhere. Your journey begins now.
